name: coder-iq2
description: Asymmetric IQ2 with a CODE-calibrated imatrix (same bit budget, spent on code-hot experts)
_note: Supply a rendered code corpus at `corpus` (e.g. from coding benchmarks / repos). `forgequant build coder-iq2` collects coder.dat then quantizes. Same recipe as medical-iq2, different calibration.
